title: Package Loading, Dumping & Locking

classes.name: ArrayLoader
methods: private createLink(string $source, string $sourceVersion, string $description, string $target, string $prettyConstraint): Link
classes.notes: Core loader; createObject() normalizes version via VersionParser then instantiates $class; configureObject() sets all metadata fields; loadPackages() uses link cache for bulk loading

classes.name: RootPackageLoader
methods: public static extractStabilityFlags(array $requires, string $minimumStability, array $stabilityFlags): array
classes.notes: Overrides load() to auto-detect version via VersionGuesser; validates name via ValidatingArrayLoader::hasPackageNamingError(); sets aliases/stabilityFlags/references on RootPackage; registers repos via RepositoryFactory::defaultRepos()

classes.name: ValidatingArrayLoader
methods: private validateRegex(string $property, string $regex, bool $mandatory = false): bool
private validateFlatArray(string $property, ?string $regex = null, bool $mandatory = false): bool
classes.notes: Decorator/wrapper around another LoaderInterface; validates all config fields, collects errors/warnings, throws InvalidPackageException on errors, then delegates to inner $loader->load()

classes.name: JsonLoader
classes.notes: Thin adapter: parses JSON from filename/string/JsonFile, then delegates to inner LoaderInterface::load(). Does NOT implement LoaderInterface itself.

classes.name: ArrayDumper
methods: private dumpValues(PackageInterface $package, array $keys, array $data): array<string, mixed>
classes.notes: Converts PackageInterface to plain array; handles source/dist/links/suggests/time/keywords; adds CompletePackageInterface fields (scripts/license/authors/etc); adds RootPackageInterface minimum-stability; dumpValues() uses get+ucfirst($method) reflection pattern

classes.name: Locker
methods: setLockData(array $packages, ?array $devPackages, array $platformReqs, array $platformDevReqs, array $aliases, string $minimumStability, array $stabilityFlags, bool $preferStable, bool $preferLowest, array $platformOverrides, bool $write = true): bool
classes.notes: Reads/writes composer.lock; internally owns ArrayLoader and ArrayDumper instances; lockPackages() calls dumper->dump() per package; getLockedRepository() calls loader->load() per locked entry; contentHash covers name/version/require/require-dev/conflict/replace/provide/minimum-stability/prefer-stable/repositories/extra + config.platform

classes.name: Comparer
properties: private array{changed?: string[], removed?: string[], added?: string[]} $changed
classes.notes: Directory-level file comparison utility; doCompare() builds recursive file hash trees for source and update dirs; tracks changed/removed/added files; uses xxh3 (PHP 8.1+) or sha1 for hashing. Standalone utility, not coupled to the loading/dumping pipeline.

relationships: Locker composes ArrayLoader (owns instance, used in getLockedRepository + getPlatformRequirements)
Locker composes ArrayDumper (owns instance, used in lockPackages)
Locker depends_on InstallationManager (getInstallPath for dev package timestamps)
key_patterns: Decorator: ValidatingArrayLoader wraps any LoaderInterface, validates then delegates
Adapter: JsonLoader parses JSON sources then delegates to inner LoaderInterface
Inheritance: RootPackageLoader extends ArrayLoader, overrides load() with extra root-package logic
Composition: Locker owns both ArrayLoader and ArrayDumper, bridging lock file I/O with package objects
Reflection: ArrayDumper::dumpValues() and ArrayLoader use 'get/set'+ucfirst($method) dynamic dispatch
Caching: Locker::getLockData() caches parsed lock JSON in $lockDataCache; ArrayLoader::loadPackages() caches Link objects
important_notes: LoaderInterface has single method load(array, string): BasePackage. JsonLoader does NOT implement LoaderInterface (it is a separate adapter class). Locker::setLockData() compares new lock vs existing before writing to avoid unnecessary disk writes. Comparer is a standalone dir-diff utility unrelated to the loader/dumper pipeline.
